creator: quentin.thebault@defenso.fr
text:
Hello,

I tried the patch in https://reviews.freebsd.org/D37972 on 14.2, trying to passthrough my PCI QCNFA765 (Qualcomm Wireless) to Windows 11 Pro 24H2, and the cpu topology below, but it does not work. The VM still locks on boot. Killing the bhyve process with kill -9 (regular kill did not work) killed the entire system.

cpus = 8
cpu_sockets = 2
cpu_cores = 4
cpu_threads = 1
